title: We Can Come Back to Each Other
subtitle: An affirmation for the relationship that has drifted
excerpt: A short affirmation for a relationship that has grown distant. The statement names the possibility of return without requiring it to have happened yet.

practice.whenToUse: Use when the distance in a relationship feels fixed and you want to hold open the possibility of closing it before you try.

content.text: A one-minute affirmation for the relationship that has drifted. The statement does not claim the return has happened. It holds open the possibility before the attempt is made.
New to affirmations as a practice? Read
We can come back to each other. Distance is not the end.
Say it when the distance feels permanent. Say it before a conversation you have been avoiding. Say it as many times as it takes to feel like a real possibility rather than a wish.
